A clear description of the bug.

1. Run `gal ...`
2. ...

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node.js: [e.g., 20.11.0]
- GAL CLI: [e.g., 1.0.0] (run `gal --version`)

Any other relevant information.
